violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Reach-in cooler interior and walk-in cooler/freezer observed with debris build up.

IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In use utensils were noted being stored or contacting unclean surfaces. Observed deep fryer skimmer and other deep fryer cleaning utensils being store in a under-counter garbage can with food waste in bag. Observed fried food scoop being stored on a hanger in the hot holding cabinet with heavy debris build up.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Equipment exteriors noted not clean. Observed heavy debris build up on equipment exteriors cooler handles order monitors above food prep areas and under sides of warming cabinets.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling and ceiling vents in the kitchen noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Equipment exteriors noted not clean throughout kitchen area. Debris build up primarily on hot holding equipment.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Countertop in ice cream area has a large crack through the middle of it. Observing some debris build up between the sections of countertop.
